current_style_assessment: No queue-visible defect blocker remains; the current visual language is acceptable as a restrained two-panel manuscript mechanism schematic unless this figure is promoted to a flagship visual.
human_question: I recommend keeping the current style as the benchmark until a candidate beats it on explicit visual checks. Should I prepare keep-current, bounded TikZ polish, SVG polish evidence, or full redesign evidence next?

choices.label: Keep current style
choices.next_slice: create style benchmark pack and comparison policy only
choices.risk: may remain solid-manuscript rather than flagship polish

choices.label: Bounded TikZ source polish
choices.next_slice: open one targeted typography, spacing, or stroke polish task
choices.risk: can improve hierarchy but should stay one local pass

choices.label: SVG polish handoff
choices.next_slice: run polish queue and require positive ready_for_svg_polish evidence
choices.risk: requires positive readiness evidence and separate SVG artifact approval

choices.label: Full style redesign
choices.next_slice: create redesign alternatives against this benchmark before source mutation
choices.risk: changes visual language and needs benchmark comparison

follow_up.implementation_slice: Record style policy only; create benchmark evidence before any future redesign, source, SVG, release, export, or golden mutation.
